svg.text: Wire to protoboard alongside ESP32 · All voltages 3.3V logic unless noted
Sensor VCC → 3.3V GND → GND (3 wires total per sensor)
Multiple sensors share same 3 wires — 1-Wire is a bus
Full tank (33 Ω) → 0.82 V Half (135 Ω) → 1.90 V Empty (240 Ω) → 2.33 V
⚠ calibrate with ESPHome calibrate_linear at known fill levels
US marine standard (Teleflex/Faria) — verify sender direction on first test
⚠ use 1A fuse inline on BAT+ wire to this circuit
R2 + C in parallel: solder cap leads across R2 pads
Noise filter cap — solder across R2
⚠ Wires from BAT+ (starter battery positive) MUST be fused inline — use 1A fuse holder in series before R1.
⚠ Ensure ESP32 GND ties to boat ground for fuel sender reading to be accurate.
Rudder pot (GPIO36): no resistors needed — pot spans 3.3V to GND directly. Add terminal pads only.
